zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland於大約1270年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親William de Keith Marischal of Scotland36歲，母親Barbara De Seaton36歲。他於1287年與Barbara Douglas結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1314年登記服兵役。他去世於1332年8月11日在英國蘇格蘭培爾迪普林享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland于大约1270年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲William de Keith Marischal of Scotland36岁，母亲Barbara De Seaton36岁。他于1287年与Barbara Douglas结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1314年登记服兵役。他去世于1332年8月11日在英国苏格兰培爾迪普林享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland was born about 1270, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, was 36 and his mother, Barbara De Seaton, was 36. He married Barbara Douglas in 1287. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1314. He died on 11 August 1332, in Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland est né environ 1270, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Barbara De Seaton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Douglas en 1287. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. Il est décédé le 11 août 1332, à Dupplin, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland um 1270 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Keith Marischal of Scotland 36 und seine Mutter Barbara De Seaton 36. Er hat 1287 Barbara Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. August 1332 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Dupplin, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland è nato il circa 1270 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Barbara De Seaton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Douglas nel 1287. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. Morì il 11 agosto 1332, nel Dupplin, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Keith Marischal of Scotlandが約1270年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父William de Keith Marischal of Scotlandは36歳，母Barbara De Seatonは36歳であった。1287年にBarbara Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。彼は1332年8月11日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアダップリンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Keith Marischal of Scotland(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara De Seaton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1287년 Barbara Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1332년 8월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 드업플린에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Barbara De Seaton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Douglas em 1287. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1332, em Dupplin, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland родился около 1270 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Keith Marischal of Scotland было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara De Seaton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Douglas в 1287 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 августа 1332 г. в местности дупплинь, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland nació aproximadamente 1270, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Barbara De Seaton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Barbara Douglas en 1287. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1332, en Dupplin, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
